name: Aoki's Shave Ice
tagline: Directly across from Matsumoto with a fraction of the line — locals' quiet favorite since 1981.
parking: Street spots fill fast — same parking situation as Matsumoto
talkStory: The Aoki family are Haleiwa OGs — while tourists mob Matsumoto, locals quietly slip into Aoki's. Open since 1981. If you want to compare the two (and you should), get a small at each. The azuki beans + condensed milk combo is the local move.
